description: Generic defaults for PDF-to-XLSX conversion. Override per-document type via specific hint files.

desk._comment: Set columnsPerUnit to match the repeating cell group width of the source Excel. 3 is common for Japanese seating charts (name/title/ID per column).

columnWidths._comment: breakpoints map PDF point widths to Excel character units. Adjust for different source column widths.

fonts._comment: Match the original Excel's default font. Common: Meiryo UI (JP), Calibri (EN), Arial
